mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase the discount rate for future equity cash flows, directly suppressing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window or positive returns exceed 60% when FEDFUNDS rises.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous deceleration in real GDP growth and elevated inflation indicates stagflationary pressure, which forces monetary tightening and reduces corporate profit margins, driving negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields positive returns in > 55% of cases or Rank IC < 0.02 over 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: An expansion in the index of industrial production reflects strengthening supply-side capacity and rising corporate output, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.01) during monetary tightening phases or positive returns drop below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate exceeds 4.0%, borrowing costs for corporations and consumers become prohibitively high, compressing earnings growth and triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in > 60% of instances above the 4.0% threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Steady growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates robust labor demand and rising household income, supporting consumer spending and driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.03 over 3-year rolling window or positive returns fall below 50% when PAYEMS increases.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent increases in real sales of existing homes and housing starts signal strengthening residential demand and construction activity, boosting related sector earnings and producing positive S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Combined signal yields negative returns in > 55% of triggered cases or Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production signal a contraction in manufacturing and supply chain bottlenecks, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO crosses below previous month for 2 consecutive months
failure_condition: Positive returns exceed 60% during consecutive INDPRO declines or Rank IC < 0.01.
